description:
Winner of Best of Andover housecleaning 2 Years In a Row! 4.7 Google Rating!

Step into ownership of a well-established, market-leading lifestyle business that operates Monday through Friday from 8 a.m. to 5 p.m.—no nights or weekends required. This residential cleaning business has built a strong reputation for quality service and enjoys a loyal customer base in the growing home services industry.

Proudly serving the affluent suburbs of Andover, this business has built a strong reputation for exceptional service while actively supporting the community through its ongoing partnership with Neighbors in Need. Its high customer satisfaction rating reflects not only operational excellence but also its meaningful impact as a trusted community partner.

As busy lifestyles drive increasing demand for home cleaning, this franchise is positioned at the forefront of a sector with strong, consistent consumer spending. Operating successfully for a decade in the local market, this business offers both stability and growth potential.

Key Highlights:

Turnkey Operation: A proven model allows the owner to focus on team leadership, business culture, and customer satisfaction, while integrated systems handle scheduling, billing, and operations.

Proprietary Technology: Sophisticated, one-of-a-kind software provides real-time insights and streamlines day-to-day management for maximum efficiency.

Skilled Team in Place: Experienced and well-trained employees are ready to support a smooth transition, maintaining the business’s strong culture centered around people, growth, and community.

Ongoing Support: Enjoy comprehensive operational support including training, recruitment assistance, KPI understanding and review, and marketing strategy.

Work-Life Balance: Homes are cleaned only during standard weekday hours—freeing your evenings and weekends.

Benefits Include:

One-on-one business coaching with experienced industry professionals

Centralized lead generation and marketing fulfill
